AR_CoastMap/CoastMap/g-0+hubFirstSide+hu.description: The Esoteric Coast (also known as Realm of Jor, Jor's Realm, or JOR) is the name of the dimension created by the wizard Jor. It is the world in which Esoteric Ebb takes place.

Askanii (sometimes Askan) is one of the eight bands along The Coast. It neighbors Reeds and Divinii Torum.
